_id.description: Unique identifier for the pattern, generated by TheHive.

_type.description: Entity type discriminator. Always 'Pattern' for pattern objects.

_createdBy.description: User who created the pattern. Typically 'system@thehive.local' for catalog-imported patterns.

_createdAt.description: Date-time string when the pattern was created. Converted from Unix timestamp in YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS format.

_updatedBy.description: User who last updated the pattern.

_updatedAt.description: Date-time string when the pattern was last updated. Converted from Unix timestamp in YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS format.

patternId.description: MITRE ATT&CK technique identifier (e.g. 'T1059'). Sub-techniques use dot notation (e.g. 'T1059.001'). This is the field to use when creating a procedure.

name.description: Human-readable name of the technique (e.g. 'Command and Scripting Interpreter').

description.description: Full MITRE ATT&CK description of the technique. May contain markdown. May indicate the technique is deprecated.

tactics.description: List of tactic names this technique belongs to (e.g. ['persistence', 'privilege-escalation']). A technique can belong to multiple tactics. When creating a procedure, the tactic field must be one of these values.

url.description: URL to the official MITRE ATT&CK page for this technique.

patternType.description: Type of pattern. Always 'attack-pattern' in the Enterprise catalog.

revoked.description: Whether this technique has been revoked in the MITRE ATT&CK framework. Revoked techniques should not be used when creating new procedures.

remoteSupport.description: Whether this technique can be performed remotely.

dataSources.description: Data sources that can be used to detect this technique (e.g. 'Process: Process Creation'). May be empty.

defenseBypassed.description: Defenses that this technique is known to bypass. May be empty.

detection.description: Free-text description of how to detect this technique. May be empty.

permissionsRequired.description: Permissions required to execute this technique (e.g. 'Administrator', 'User'). May be empty.

platforms.description: Platforms this technique applies to (e.g. 'Windows', 'Linux', 'macOS', 'Network Devices').

systemRequirements.description: System requirements for executing this technique. May be empty.

version.description: MITRE ATT&CK version of this technique definition (e.g. '2.0').

extraData.description: Always empty for patterns. No extraData fields are supported.

capecId.description: CAPEC identifier if this technique maps to a Common Attack Pattern Enumeration and Classification entry (e.g. 'CAPEC-471'). Null for most techniques.

capecUrl.description: URL to the CAPEC entry. Null when capecId is null.
